label: KEEP_SELECTED_CLOSE_ACTION_EXPORT_SPEC_SELECTED

prior_blocker.label: UNKNOWN_STRICT_RESCUE_CLOSE_SELECTED_FIXTURE_FIELDS_MISSING
prior_blocker.summary: Current actions/candidate_registry/residual_lots and selected_actions artifacts do not contain close-action rows; only aggregate pair fields are present.

why_selected: Strict rescue close schema is already selected, but implementation is blocked by missing selected close-action fields.
Adding a selected close-action export to future state-machine/candidate pipeline runs is the smallest local path that unlocks close source-truth validation without replay broad search.
Deferring to another target would leave the close timing/cost/source-linkage gap unaddressed.
non_goals: Do not infer close actions by scanning replay_store_v2 book/trade rows.
Do not use external private account data.
Do not promote, canary, shadow, or claim deployability from this schema alone.
Do not revive frozen mechanisms such as fill-to-balance90 or source/public price caps.

source_truth_boundary.correct_sequence: public/proxy inspiration -> local candidate/replay research -> replay_store_v2 source-truth validation -> no-order/shadow review -> controlled canary/small execution -> our own private order/fill/inventory truth validation -> deployable/scale review

why_aggregate_pair_fields_are_insufficie: pair_actions_after_seed does not identify which seed action closed which prior residual lot.
pair_qty_after_seed does not expose close_ts_ms, close_side, close_qty, close_px, or close fee source.
pair_cost_wavg_after_seed does not provide close book/trade source refs or stable replay refs.

sample_policy.source: selected close actions exported by state-machine, then sampled for truth_validation_response_v1

deterministic_close_action_id.close_sequence_rule: monotonic sequence per profile/day/condition_id ordered by close_ts_ms then source_seed_action_id then close_source_action_id

producer_implementation_notes.state_machine_hook: Record close rows inside pair_inventory when a newly accepted seed pairs against an opposite-side residual lot.
lot_state_needed: Lot should carry source_seed_action_id or deterministic seed action id, source_candidate_row_id, side, qty, px, and ts_ms.
Before decrementing paired lots, capture pre-close residual qty/cost and paired qty.
The current seed that triggers pair_inventory should be identifiable so the close side and close_ts_ms are not guessed.
producer_implementation_notes.future_table_contract: state_machine_results.duckdb should include selected_close_actions alongside actions, candidate_registry, residual_lots, and summary_by_day.
producer_implementation_notes.truth_response_flow: selected_close_actions -> strict_rescue_close_selected_request_v1 fixture -> replay_store_v2 bounded selected lookup -> truth_validation_response_v1 strict_rescue_closes.csv -> action scorer close-field metrics.

output_contract_for_future_validator.request: strict_rescue_close_selected_request_v1 JSON/CSV with selected close actions only
output_contract_for_future_validator.strict_rescue_closes: strict_rescue_closes.csv must contain close_action_id, close_ts_ms, close_side, close_qty, close_px, official_fee, fee_rate, fee_rate_source, book_l1_ref, book_l2_ref, trade_before_ref, trade_after_ref, validation_status, and reasons
output_contract_for_future_validator.scorer: truth_validation_response_action_scorer should report strict_rescue_close_row_count, missing fields, fee/source completeness, and private/promotion guards

pass_fail_criteria.KEEP: Future export has selected_close_actions rows with all required fields, sample <=30 across allowed days, explicit fee_rate_source, and validator/scorer can produce SOURCE_TRUTH_VALIDATED_RESEARCH_ONLY while private/deployable/promotion guards remain false.
pass_fail_criteria.UNKNOWN: Producer cannot identify the newly accepted seed or paired residual lot before inventory mutation; name exact missing state fields.
pass_fail_criteria.DISCARD: The design requires broad replay discovery, hard-coded fee rates, external private truth, or after-the-fact summary-only filtering.

next_action.description: Local no-network review of adding selected_close_actions export to the state-machine/candidate pipeline. Inspect pair_inventory/Lot state and decide whether a default-off export can be implemented without changing strategy behavior.

research_ranking.label: KEEP_SELECTED_CLOSE_ACTION_EXPORT_SPEC_SELECTED
research_ranking.interpretation: A concrete local selected close-action export spec is selected to unblock strict rescue close source-truth validation.
